description:
In types.rs:1292, float literals use `format!("{}", f.get())` which drops the .0 suffix for whole-number floats. A spec containing float literal 10.0 prints as 10, making it indistinguishable from int literal 10 in expected.specs output.

Affected fixtures: vr2_float_arith

Fix: use `format!("{:?}", f.get())` or a custom formatter that ensures .0 is always present for floats.
title: types.rs Display: whole-number floats render without .0 suffix
